heading: Report on membership of Iran in international organizations
label: 8773 Report on membership of Iran in international organizations
text: Not later than 180 days after , and not later than September 1 of each year thereafter, the Secretary of State shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report listing the international organizations of which Iran is a member and detailing the amount that the United States contributes to each such organization on an annual basis.August 10, 2012
